[2020-11-29 16:20] sano712 (sano): I'm personally against manticore changes, I like the unit
[2020-11-29 16:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): manti isnt just okay for me
[2020-11-29 16:20] sano712 (sano): unless it's something very subtle
[2020-11-29 16:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): its imo *slightly slightly slightly* on the strong side
[2020-11-29 16:20] megasupp (mega-supp): 4x for an attacker? Insane

[2020-11-29 16:22] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Yeah, I think its clunkiness is what's holding it back a lot from feling like a great unit
[2020-11-29 16:22] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): I don't think "just ok" is any good at all
[2020-11-29 16:23] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): As an argument against it* Or, however I worded it before
[2020-11-29 16:23] megasupp (mega-supp): I mean a majority of units would be "just ok" no matter what changes we make
[2020-11-29 16:23] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): I disagree, drones are always going to be baseline
[2020-11-29 16:23] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): So, units will always have a frame of reference
[2020-11-29 16:23] megasupp (mega-supp): Unless we fucking destroy all balance whatsoever
[2020-11-29 16:24] p0lari (Polari): masn said he considers manti *not* "just ok"
[2020-11-29 16:24] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): And under that frame, they can either be "bad/UP", "ok/fine", "feels good/I'd buy it", or "OP/autobuy"
[2020-11-29 16:24] megasupp (mega-supp): I don't really understand you here
[2020-11-29 16:24] p0lari (Polari): so what exactly are we going on about now
[2020-11-29 16:25] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Well, maybe I misunderstand what you meant by "a majority of units would be "just ok" no matter what changes we make", then, Mega
[2020-11-29 16:26] p0lari (Polari): ah he used the phrase there too
[2020-11-29 16:26] megasupp (mega-supp): I meant that "just ok" units are basically units in the middle of hypothetical unit ranking
[2020-11-29 16:26] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Ah, I agree with that
[2020-11-29 16:27] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): I thought you meant "All units will feel 'just ok' no matter how we balance them, because they're compared to each other in effectiveness", or some such, my mistake
[2020-11-29 16:28] p0lari (Polari): that's not really wrong either? any current unit would feel like ass if everything else got simultaneously buffed through the roof
[2020-11-29 16:28] megasupp (mega-supp): And if the goal is to bring individual unit power levels closer together it doesn't really make sense to shift units away from the middle
[2020-11-29 16:29] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Well, it's not necessarily wrong, but I disagree that things could get too out of hand is all. But, never mind that, it's not important
[2020-11-29 16:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): manticore is the tpye of unit that would be orpessive if it was any stronger than it is
[2020-11-29 16:29] megasupp (mega-supp): Or do you want to have strong units and just rotate which units are strong?
[2020-11-29 16:30] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): The Manticore buff that I'd love to see is where its clunkiness is removed, and I think part of its clunkiness is how you're forced to buy a bad unit and attack with it before buying it
[2020-11-29 16:30] p0lari (Polari): can you elaborate on what you mean by disagreeing that things could get too out of hand, I don't follow at all
[2020-11-29 16:32] megasupp (mega-supp): I can't come up with a buff that won't make it opressive while keeping it's identity
[2020-11-29 16:34] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Ah, when I said "drones are always going to be baseline", I meant "base set units are always going to be baseline", does that clear things up or?
[2020-11-29 16:35] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Things're balanced to be more valuable than base set units so that they get bought over them, but base set units need to still be strong enough to fill in gaps in the random set of units. So, if the random set units are incredibly OP, base set units will never be bought to fill in the gap, is what I was getting at
[2020-11-29 16:36] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): But, it was besides the point, since I misunderstood what Mega meant to begin with, so
[2020-11-29 16:41] p0lari (Polari): the issue with tuning isn't just the power level relative to other units though, you also have to consider that when units get too efficient, the way the discrete amounts of resources each player has available on the early turns lines up with the purchases you want to make becomes extremely important
[2020-11-29 16:42] p0lari (Polari): when a unit gets really good, it's very likely that there's a line for one player where your buildup lines up nicely, and that's a recipe for high side imbalances
[2020-11-29 16:42] p0lari (Polari): like with the old wild drone
[2020-11-29 16:43] elyot: BTW I hope you folks are all gonna come play in the mode-of-the-week brawl in 15 mins
[2020-11-29 16:43] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Well, yes, but that was in response to this
> I mean a majority of units would be "just ok" no matter what changes we make
And it was under my wrong assumption. Ofc it's important how the resources line up
[2020-11-29 16:43] megasupp (mega-supp): Speaking of wild drone it could use a buff I think
[2020-11-29 16:44] sano712 (sano): @Elyot, can you make the event last longer? I'm sure everyone wants to play with the changed units
[2020-11-29 16:44] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Hmmm? What kind of buff would you be looking for Mega?
[2020-11-29 16:44] sano712 (sano): It's also helpful to decide on the changes to be implemented

[2020-11-29 16:45] sano712 (sano): I don't buy wild drone as often as I think I should, I think people regard the unit as quite strong?

[2020-11-29 18:18] megasupp (mega-supp): if you think you would buy more engis to keep econing with wilds then under Yujiri's model wild inflation is somewhere between 1.308 and 1.31 for comparison vivid is 1.32
[2020-11-29 18:21] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean isnt it a pretty much a better drone
[2020-11-29 18:21] megasupp (mega-supp): if you think you would just fit this whenever you want then basically yeah, but is it that bad? you still get your first one sniped. and it's more like a mini challenge to try to get econ without wilds. if you succeed you get a little bonus
[2020-11-29 18:21] masn6811 (Masne98888): the only scenario when its correct to snipe it is opponent has wall and you have exactly 3 attack
[2020-11-29 18:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): (assuming no bigger absorbers/plexos)
[2020-11-29 18:22] megasupp (mega-supp): well what about larger absorbers? like matrix
[2020-11-29 18:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think people will likely red rush with it
[2020-11-29 18:24] megasupp (mega-supp): is 2HP a big enough disincentive to prevent people from red rushing?
[2020-11-29 18:24] megasupp (mega-supp): like in current patch
[2020-11-29 18:25] megasupp (mega-supp): besides. If we are nerfing red rush units across the board shouldn't it be more fine?
[2020-11-29 18:25] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean the main use is already red rush
[2020-11-29 18:25] masn6811 (Masne98888): might be fine with these nerfs
[2020-11-29 18:25] elyot: I think if you have 6 attack and they have two 3hp drones then killing WE is probably better than killing 2 drones but sometimes killing the Drones will stop a key purchase
[2020-11-29 18:26] elyot: options are always good
[2020-11-29 18:26] elyot: adding an optional worse play is not worth zero
[2020-11-29 18:26] megasupp (mega-supp): if anything maybe elyot animus would be worth considering with buffed wild since you can follow up with more wilds without being too punished
[2020-11-29 18:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): its not worth zero, but it is worth very little
[2020-11-29 18:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): also makes it an extrmely good bp drone, not sure if thats a bad thing
[2020-11-29 18:27] megasupp (mega-supp): for general case purposes it's negligible
[2020-11-29 18:28] megasupp (mega-supp): oh yeah it becomes very bp
[2020-11-29 18:30] megasupp (mega-supp): but I mean it kinda already is the most bp economy there is (tied with ebb)
[2020-11-29 18:31] megasupp (mega-supp): so only case where that matters is if you can convert your drones directly into attack (venges)
[2020-11-29 18:32] megasupp (mega-supp): otherwise there will be more breach-vulnerable econ on the bp players field
[2020-11-29 18:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): my main concern is that it'll just make this a straight up better econ unit than drone
[2020-11-29 18:34] megasupp (mega-supp): Vivid is a straight up better econ unit than drone
[2020-11-29 18:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): i guess its fine, it wont homgenize builds just as much
[2020-11-29 18:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): heck, now that you mention it, vivid is maybe a bit too much an autobuy
[2020-11-29 18:36] megasupp (mega-supp): but in wilds case you can argue that if your line is particularly natural (so you don't have to buy wilds to smooth out your build) you are rewarded with not losing 1 drone when opp gets 3 attack
[2020-11-29 18:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): yes, valid argument. and theres more wild decisions than vivid decisions
[2020-11-29 18:36] elyot: there are tons of situations where you can deny absorb with it
[2020-11-29 18:36] elyot: like small opportunities for absorb denial are almost always good
[2020-11-29 18:37] elyot: there are tons of sets with thermite or larger defenders or plexo or whatever
[2020-11-29 18:37] masn6811 (Masne98888): i dont think current wild drone is weak, but im open to trying it out
[2020-11-29 18:37] megasupp (mega-supp): I think it is definitely on the weak side
[2020-11-29 18:38] masn6811 (Masne98888): 3B for X->3 auride i kinda want to try out
[2020-11-29 18:38] masn6811 (Masne98888): the thing about wild drone is it gives quite a bit of power to fastimus
[2020-11-29 18:38] megasupp (mega-supp): it also gives quite a bit of power to elyot animus
[2020-11-29 18:39] megasupp (mega-supp): DD/1A/11T is kinda a good start
[2020-11-29 18:39] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean its weak if you compare to doomie, but i dont think doomie is very fair to compare anything to
[2020-11-29 18:39] megasupp (mega-supp): if you can get away with it sure
[2020-11-29 18:40] masn6811 (Masne98888): you have pretty much no choice if opponent goes wild fastimus
[2020-11-29 18:41] masn6811 (Masne98888): what do people think of vivid? im open to trying 2EEDDD, also think its fine as is
[2020-11-29 18:41] masn6811 (Masne98888): but 2EEDDD makes p1 not have that hyper greedy vivid opening
[2020-11-29 18:41] masn6811 (Masne98888): and i kinda like that being an option
[2020-11-29 18:42] masn6811 (Masne98888): there is a point where you stop buying vivids since you want to use your other drones for Fs. i think im fine with that point being where it is now
[2020-11-29 18:42] masn6811 (Masne98888): but im open to expeirments
[2020-11-29 18:43] megasupp (mega-supp): so next event we try 3HP wild ?
[2020-11-29 18:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): im open to trying that. think it might be too strong but thats what science is for
